CVE-2024-11858.title: A flaw was found in Radare2, which contains a command injection v ...
CVE-2024-11858.summary: A flaw was found in Radare2, which contains a command injection vulnerability caused by insufficient input validation when handling Pebble Application files. Maliciously crafted inputs can inject shell commands during command parsing, leading to unintended behavior during file processing​
